message:
fix(security): replace direct equality with constant-time comparison for signatures

Concurrent agent introduced a new constant_time module (ct_eq) and migrated all
signature/token verification paths from direct == comparison to constant-time
equality, preventing timing-based side-channel attacks that could leak signature
validity information to an attacker measuring response latency:

New module:
- security/constant_time.rs: provides ct_eq() for byte-level constant-time comparison
- security/mod.rs: registers pub mod constant_time

Migrated call sites (8 total):
- connector/lease_coordinator.rs: lease signature verification
- extensions/artifact_contract.rs: contract signature verification
- security/impossible_default.rs: token signature vs content hash
- security/quarantine_controller.rs: quarantine entry signature check
- security/threshold_sig.rs: threshold signature verification
- runtime/speculation/proof_executor.rs: receipt signature verification
- policy/compatibility_gate.rs: gate receipt signature verification
- tools/profile_tuning_harness.rs: HMAC verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
